name: trpc-agent-go
description: trpc-agent-go is a powerful Go framework for building intelligent agent systems using large language models (LLMs) and tools.
summaryZh: trpc-agent-go is a powerful Go framework for building intelligent agent systems using large language models (LLMs) and tools. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
